nasb.text: From there they continued to Beer, that is the well where the Lord said to Moses, “Assemble the people, that I may give them water.”

esv.text: And from there they continued to Beer; that is the well of which the Lord said to Moses, “Gather the people together, so that I may give them water.”

cnv.text: 以色列人又從那裡到了比珥；從前耶和華對摩西說：“你要聚集眾民，我好把水給他們喝”，說的就是這個井。

ccb.text: 以色列人又往前走，来到比珥。耶和华曾在那里对摩西说：“把民众招聚起来，我要给他们水喝。”
